response.justification: Bogdan has extensive full-stack experience and geospatial expertise (GISCollective), but his primary languages are JavaScript/TypeScript, D, and Node.js, with only limited C++ exposure (National Instruments). His lack of direct experience with modern C++/Rust for routing/geospatial pipelines raises concerns about immediate productivity. However, his demonstrated ability to learn new stacks (e.g., DLang, Rust via contributions) and his geospatial background could offset this with onboarding support.
strengths: Proven track record of learning new languages/frameworks quickly
Experience with low-latency systems (e.g., real-time metadata at Dunnhumby)
concerns: Limited direct C++/Rust experience for routing/geospatial pipelines
Most recent relevant work (GISCollective) uses Node.js/D, not C++
No explicit mention of distributed systems or fault tolerance in recent roles
